summary: Iteration 137: FIC (FattureInCloud) Integration Fixes - ALL 18 TESTS PASS. Verified 3 bug fixes: (1) map_fattura_to_fic now sends certified_email as empty string instead of null, (2) _handle_fic_409 includes 'fields' param with ei_status and handles locked documents, (3) auto-recovery keywords include 'in corso un tentativo' and fic_document_id saved on SDI failure.

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 FIC integration bug fixes verified through unit tests and code inspection
map_fattura_to_fic correctly uses 'or ""' pattern to prevent null values in entity dict
_handle_fic_409 properly includes ei_status in search and handles locked documents gracefully
Auto-recovery keywords cover all known FIC error messages for duplicate/in-progress documents
fic_document_id is correctly persisted even on SDI send failure to prevent duplicate creation
